chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ التَّعْزِيرُ فِي جَمِيعِ الْحُدُودِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 48 – Regarding what the discretion is Obligated in the entirety of the Penalties

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ سَبَّ رَجُلًا بِغَيْرِ قَذْفٍ يُعَرِّضُ بِهِ هَلْ يُجْلَدُ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ تَعْزِيرٌ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Abdullah who, said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who insluted a man without slander, would he be treated harshly? Would he be whipped?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Upon him is a reprimand’.
